instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.subtitle: Learn how the evaluation process works for both roles
instructions.evaluatorDescription: As an evaluator, you manage the evaluation process, configure profiles, and analyze results.
instructions.evaluatedDescription: As a candidate, you complete evaluations to showcase your competencies and receive personalized feedback.

whatIsEvaluatedItems.professional: Professional competencies — Technical knowledge, industry expertise, and role-specific skills
whatIsEvaluatedItems.softSkills: Soft skills — Communication, teamwork, leadership, and interpersonal abilities
whatIsEvaluatedItems.readiness: Readiness for change — Adaptability, innovation mindset, and openness to new challenges
whatIsEvaluatedItems.cognitive: Cognitive abilities — Logical reasoning, problem-solving, and analytical thinking (timed IQ-style test)
whatIsEvaluatedItems.personality: Personality profile — Big Five (OCEAN) traits: openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness, neuroticism
whatIsEvaluatedItems.disc: Behavioral style — DISC assessment: Dominance, Influence, Steadiness, Conscientiousness
whatIsEvaluatedItems.aptitude: Aptitude — Numerical, verbal, and analytical reasoning abilities
whatIsEvaluatedItems.technical: Technical knowledge — Case study-based evaluation specific to the role

evaluatorSteps.title: Steps for the Evaluator
evaluatorSteps.step1: Log in to the admin panel at Administration > Login with your credentials
evaluatorSteps.step2: Select or create the evaluation profile that matches the role you are assessing
evaluatorSteps.step3: Generate a shareable evaluation link and send it to the candidate
evaluatorSteps.step4: Wait for the candidate to complete the evaluation — you will see results in the admin panel
evaluatorSteps.step5: Review the results: competency indices, assigned profiles, strengths, and growth areas
evaluatorSteps.step6: Optionally, use Job-Fit analysis to compare the candidate against job requirements
evaluatorSteps.step7: Export results as PDF or use the comparison tool to evaluate multiple candidates side by side

evaluatedSteps.title: Steps for the Candidate
evaluatedSteps.step1: Open the evaluation link provided by your evaluator, or select a profile from the home page
evaluatedSteps.step2: Fill in your basic information (name and email)
evaluatedSteps.step3: Answer all questions honestly — there are no right or wrong answers for competency questions
evaluatedSteps.step4: For timed tests (cognitive, aptitude), manage your time carefully — the timer is visible on screen
evaluatedSteps.step5: For personality and DISC tests, choose the answer that best describes your natural behavior
evaluatedSteps.step6: Submit your evaluation — results are generated automatically
evaluatedSteps.step7: Review your results: you will see your competency scores, strengths, and personalized recommendations

evaluatorTips.tip1: You can configure which tests to include when creating an evaluation link
evaluatorTips.tip2: Use the history section to track all past evaluations and filter by date or candidate
evaluatorTips.tip3: The AI analysis (when enabled) provides deeper insights and training recommendations

evaluatedTips.tip1: Find a quiet environment with a stable internet connection before starting
evaluatedTips.tip2: Answer based on your actual behavior, not what you think is expected
evaluatedTips.tip3: You can download your results as a PDF for your records
